summary: Verified iteration_8 fix for TEST_ leak in fast-responders leaderboard. Backend + frontend both clean. No regressions.

verification_results.leaderboard_all_limit_20: 9 vendors returned, 0 TEST_ leaks (names: V1, Kavya Sharma, Ananya Bose, Diya Singh, Riya Mehra, Nisha Bhat, Kavya Bhat, Neha Gupta, Neha Mehra)
verification_results.landing_city_champions_widget: Section [data-testid='landing-city-champions'] rendered with 4 vendors, 0 TEST_RT_V_* leaks
verification_results.reels_feed: 29 reels returned (>=15), all 29 have url set
verification_results.listings_TEST_exclusion: 50 items, 0 TEST_ titles (limit capped at 50 by validator)

critical_code_review_comments: Note: /api/v1/listings/ and /api/v1/feed enforce max limit=50; test request in review said limit=100 which returns 422. Not a bug, just review-message mismatch — tests validate correctly at limit=50.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6b fully green. Leaderboard now filters name NOT ^TEST_. All 16 pytest tests pass, landing City Champions widget clean.
rca of the issue: Previous leak: leaderboard query in /app/backend/routes/vendor_routes.py did not exclude TEST_ prefixed vendor names. Fix (verified this iteration): added {'name': {'$not': {'$regex': '^TEST_'}}} to query. Confirmed via direct API + landing UI.
